```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: 'asis'

# Helper to extract YAML
get_yaml_field <- function(file_path, field) {
  if (!file.exists(file_path)) return(NULL)
  lines <- readLines(file_path, n = 30, warn = FALSE, encoding = "UTF-8")
  pattern <- paste0("^", field, ":\\s*[\"']?(.*?)[\"']?\\s*$")
  match <- grep(pattern, lines, value = TRUE)
  if (length(match) > 0) return(gsub(pattern, "\\1", match[1]))
  return(NULL)
}

csv_name <- "related_posts.csv"
if (file.exists(csv_name)) { csv_path <- csv_name } else if (file.exists(paste0("../", csv_name))) { csv_path <- paste0("../", csv_name) } else { csv_path <- NULL }

if (!is.null(csv_path)) {
  df <- read.csv(csv_path, row.names = 1, check.names = FALSE)

  current_file_raw <- basename(knitr::current_input())
  current_key <- gsub("\\.(qmd|rmarkdown|md)$", "", current_file_raw)
  colnames(df) <- gsub("\\.(qmd|rmarkdown|md)$", "", colnames(df))

  if (current_key %in% colnames(df)) {
    sims <- df[, current_key]
    names(sims) <- colnames(df)
    sims <- sims[names(sims) != current_key & sims > 0.01]

    if (length(sims) > 0) {
      top_5 <- sort(sims, decreasing = TRUE)[1:min(5, length(sims))]

      cat("\n### একইরকম আরও লেখা \n\n")

      for (slug in names(top_5)) {
        qmd_file <- paste0(slug, ".qmd")
        if (!file.exists(qmd_file)) qmd_file <- file.path("../posts", paste0(slug, ".qmd"))

        post_title <- get_yaml_field(qmd_file, "title")
        post_img   <- get_yaml_field(qmd_file, "image")

        if (is.null(post_title)) post_title <- slug
        if (is.null(post_img)) post_img <- "[https://raw.githubusercontent.com/bishwo-web/bishwo-web.github.io/refs/heads/main/img/star/stars.jpg](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/bishwo-web/bishwo-web.github.io/refs/heads/main/img/star/stars.jpg)"

        # Using Quarto Divs for Layout
# This creates a flex-row-like structure using Markdown
        # Wrapping the image in [![](... )](link) makes it clickable
        cat("::: {layout='[[15, 85]]'}\n")
        cat(paste0("[![](", post_img, "){height='60px' style='object-fit: cover;'}]", "(", slug, ".html)\n\n"))
        cat(paste0("[**", post_title, "**](", slug, ".html)\n"))
        cat(":::\n\n")
        cat("---\n\n") # Separator line
      }
    }
  }
}
```
